demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My hands are swollen up like sausages, the pain is relentless, and I'm so exhausted I can't even open a bottle of water. Both wrists and all my finger knuckles are throbbing and I can't grip anything.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's blown up badly over the last couple of days and I've run out of my anti-inflammatory tablets — I can't open the medication or make myself food, and I live on my own.

symptom_narrative.onset: escalated rapidly over the last 48 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: getting steadily worse for two days
symptom_narrative.character: deep, constant aching with hot, tight, spongy swelling across both wrists and the finger knuckles; hands feel useless
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: excruciating and relentless — the worst it has been
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both wrists and the knuckles and middle joints of the fingers, on both hands equally
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: stiffness is terrible first thing in the morning and lasts more than three hours before the fingers loosen at all
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: my anti-inflammatory tablets usually settle it, but I ran out two days ago
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving or trying to grip anything, and the mornings
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I feel wiped out and lethargic, and I think I might be running a bit of a temperature
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had flares like this before with my joints — I'm being looked into for an inflammatory joint problem
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't grip, open jars or bottles, do up buttons, or safely prepare a meal tonight

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: being investigated for an inflammatory joint condition (a type of arthritis) — not fully confirmed yet

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: an anti-inflammatory tablet I take for my joints (meloxicam) — but I ran out two days ago

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; no one else at home to help open medication or prepare meals tonight

objective_data_offered.value: on video both wrists and the knuckles look puffy and swollen symmetrically on both hands; she holds her hands guarded against her chest and winces when she tries to move her fingers
the skin over the swollen joints does not look bright red and there are no red streaks running up either forearm that she or the camera can see
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/video impression only — cannot replace an in-person examination for subtle erythema or warmth

objective_data_offered.value: she thinks she feels a bit feverish and very fatigued but has not measured her temperature with a thermometer
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective feverishness with no measured temperature

objective_data_offered.value: unopened pre-packaged food left on the counter because she cannot open the packaging
